overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a white coat walking through a sterile, futuristic sci-fi facility. The character exits a room through a doorway, traverses clean metallic corridors with observation windows, and approaches a circular restroom door while passing a stationary NPC.

events.description: character walks through doorway from small enclosed room into corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through a metal doorway frame into a narrow corridor with an observation window showing equipment on the left

entered.detail: metal doorway frame with sliding door mechanism
large rectangular window showing adjacent room with equipment and furniture
fluorescent tube lights embedded in the corridor ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a doorway and walks into a narrow, sterile corridor. An observation window on the left reveals an adjacent room with equipment. The lighting is cool and artificial, typical of a sci-fi facility.

events.description: character turns right at the corridor intersection

agents.ego_description: turning right into a wider corridor section and walking past metal benches mounted on the left wall

entered.detail: metal benches mounted against the left wall for seating
large circular futuristic door with metallic frame and frosted glass

segments.scene_description: The character turns right into a wider corridor with benches lining the left wall. A circular futuristic door becomes visible in the distance on the right side as the character continues walking.

scene_state.functional_zone: restroom entrance with circular airlock-style door

agents.ego_description: walking toward the circular restroom door while passing a stationary NPC standing with crossed arms

notable_agents.action: standing with arms crossed near the restroom entrance, facing the corridor

entered.detail: illuminated sign reading RESTROOM mounted above the circular door
circular frosted glass panel in the center of the metallic door

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the circular restroom door, which dominates the view with its futuristic airlock design. An NPC stands to the right with arms crossed. The RESTROOM sign is clearly visible above the frosted glass door as the character gets closer.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sterile, futuristic facility that transitions from a narrow passageway into a wider communal area. It begins as the character exits a doorway into a tight corridor under cool, artificial lighting, passing an observation window that reveals equipment in an adjacent room. As the character turns right, the space expands into a wider hallway lined with benches, bringing a distant circular door into view. The scene then shifts focus toward this futuristic airlock design, passing a stationary NPC with crossed arms. Finally, the camera closes in on the frosted glass of the restroom door, bringing the sign above the entrance into clear view.
